title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Ivankov, Dragon, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Sabo as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What you think...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: About ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It enemy...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Or what?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: whirrr!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who it be?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wanna bet on it? I wager it's an enemy. Who's in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: crash, clang!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: KAMABAKA QUEENDOM, NEW WORLD

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds good to me-je. I'll put one mill on it being SABO, making a safe return.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You what?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: revolutionary army, vice captain of the west army USHIANO (morley's subordinate)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: revolutionary army, vice captain of the east army AHIRU (belo betty's subordinate)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: revolutionary army, vice captain of the south army GYAMBLE (linbergh's subordinate)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: revolutionary army, vice captain of the south army JIRON (karasu's subordinate)

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Dragon- San! IVA- San!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Sabo- San's Back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew something was up when you said you'd bet a million!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I ain't coughing up a single berry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nah, I'll wring it out of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SSO HE MADE IT HOME OKAY?! THANK GOOD- NESSESS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think you can get away with it by eating them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh... you used those binoculars, didn't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What Bino- culars?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Munch bunch

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Welcome back, SABO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: whizzz, clock.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo, I was just about to shoot ya!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Glad you didn't. Everything okay, Ahiru? Were you worried?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Maybe a little!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: SABO! You safe! Me happy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's a lulusian ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lulusia? You mean the country that vanished?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll explain later, for now, please help these guys.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: SABO- Kuuuum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just went radio silent!! How could you do that to us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My bad, Koala! I couldn't get my hands on an encryption transgender snail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All my calls would've been monitored!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used the usual three beat code to signal I was alright. Didn't you hear*?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't even on Lullusia when it happened!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You made me so worried!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Could be

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SAAMAA- BOOOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why are all you boys like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uwah! Morley!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't scare us like that again, silly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I remember you losers from Lulusia!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You've come a long way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a real shame what happened to your homes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I heard you were hoping to join our cause?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, ma'am!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First things first, get some rest! We'll straighten you out after that.

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 53 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
